name: orchestrator
description: Context-frugal, beads-backed multi-agent orchestrator for a constrained (Sonnet-4.5 / 200k) context window. A high-altitude main session loops over ready beads, dispatches disposable worker subagents (scout/planner/implementer/verifier/reviewer/investigator/test-writer) to do the actual reading/editing/verifying, and records outcomes back into beads + git — keeping the orchestrator window near-empty. Ships the orchestration-protocol + plan-first-dispatch skills, the worker agents, the metrics-reporting skill, and the commands /implement, /triage, /cover, /notify (file an interjection bead), and /gather-metrics (structured run metrics to ./metrics/). The portable, ADS-agnostic counterpart of the brain-orchestrator plugin.
